text.title: ES Snapshots Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping aggregate size + replay cost to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Cold-load latency > 100ms p99 OR stream length > 200 events?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology: replay is fast enough; snapshots add operational debt

branch.question: Can the team enforce schema-bump invalidation in CI?

conclusion.verdict: defer: train + add CI gate first; otherwise snapshots will silently corrupt
adopt snapshots: N ∈ [50,100], version-aware storage, loader fall-back to replay-from-zero

text.example: needs_snapshot=true (5000 events/wallet, 600ms p99) → invalidation_discipline=true → N=100, schema_version column, invalidate Wallet on schema bump.
